nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous document creator
nodes.grounding_span: I would typically collaborate with the AI through a task, I might talk with it about what i need it to create in a document and then ask for amendments

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous categorizer without human review
nodes.grounding_span: I'm happy to send them over to the software which then extracts the information and I'll cast my eye over it before confirming

nodes.label: AI as confidence booster in solo role
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or untrustworthy in solo role
nodes.grounding_span: the AI provides a bit of support for what I'm doing, if im comfortable with the work and the AI is then I have a greater degree of confidence in it

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting or unreliable for specialized tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it was able to draft it up very quickly and ask me for the input information ... which saved me hours and hours of typing and research

nodes.label: Manual task allocation requiring job knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI-automated task allocation without human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely prefer to handle booking down the tasks onto the correct job sheets myself as they require knowledge of the jobs that is outside of an AI's capabilities

nodes.label: Human oversight for financial accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer to match the transactions myself with the help of AI but never allowing AI to auto categorise or match transactions due to risks with miskeeping accounts

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saved me hours and hours of typing and research

nodes.label: Professional confidence and validation
nodes.grounding_span: I have a greater degree of confidence in it than if it was just me doing it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: saved me hours and hours of typing and research which was really appreciated

nodes.label: Preference for manual job sheet allocation
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely prefer to handle booking down the tasks onto the correct job sheets myself

nodes.label: Cautious approach to AI in financial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: never allowing AI to auto categorise or match transactions due to risks with miskeeping accounts

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI delegation
nodes.grounding_span: as AI gets smarter there will be more areas that I will be able to delegate to AI to complete tasks quicker

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I might talk with it about what i need it to create in a document and then ask for amendments based on what it creates before checking I'm happy

nodes.label: Risk-conscious oversight — maintains human verification for accuracy-critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'll cast my eye over it before confirming I'm happy with it
